prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Fix authentication validation bugs. Focus strictly on email validation edge cases.
chatInput: Hey, I noticed the regex in auth.js was rejecting '.co.uk' and '.info' email addresses. I fixed it and added unit tests for these domains.
description: Fixing a bug with email domains is exactly aligned with fixing email validation edge cases. Adding unit tests for the fix is standard best practice, not scope creep.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Add transaction list view. Display date, amount, and status on a simple table layout.
chatInput: Cleaned up DashboardLayout.jsx by extracting the date formatter into a helper function in utils.js to make the table code more readable.
description: Code refactoring/cleanup to make the mandated dashboard table code readable is standard practice and does not add new features.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Update contact form page to include validation for phone number fields.
chatInput: Added Jest unit tests for the phone number validation regex in contactForm.js to cover empty, short, and formatted strings.
description: Writing tests for the specified feature is standard development workflow and within scope.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Correct the landing page header copy to read 'AI-powered sprint watchdog'.
chatInput: docs(landing): fix typos and update landing page heading to 'AI-powered sprint watchdog' as requested in JIRA-823
description: Updating copy exactly as requested is within scope.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Integrate Stripe checkout button on the premium subscription page.
chatInput: Hey PM, does the Stripe checkout button need to be disabled when the payment form is in a loading state? Just wanted to clarify.
description: Asking clarifying questions about the UI behavior of a scoped feature is not scope creep.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Investigate and log backend API timeout issues on the webhook endpoint.
chatInput: I added detailed console.error logs and winston logging middleware to output stack traces when API timeout errors are caught on the webhook.
description: Adding diagnostics and logging to investigate timeouts is within the scope of the investigation task.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Center the logo image and adjust footer margin to 24px on the landing page.
chatInput: style: adjust logo centering via flexbox and set footer margin-top to 24px to match design spec
description: CSS styling adjustments to match the design spec are within scope.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Address high-severity security vulnerabilities reported in dependency scan.
chatInput: Upgraded axios from 1.6.0 to 1.6.8 to patch the server-side request forgery vulnerability (CVE-2023-45857).
description: Upgrading dependencies to patch security vulnerabilities is part of addressing reported vulnerabilities.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Implement contact form submission handler.
chatInput: Added try-catch error handling to block submit requests if network is down, and show a 'Network error, please try again' toast.
description: Error handling and basic user feedback on submission failures are standard robust implementation requirements, not scope creep.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Add technical documentation on building local Docker image.
chatInput: docs: updated README.md with detailed Docker build commands and environment variable options.
description: Adding technical documentation as requested is within scope.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Fix authentication validation bugs. Focus strictly on email validation edge cases.
chatInput: While I'm fixing the login validation bug, I'm going to add OAuth2 support for Google and GitHub — makes more sense to do it now while I'm in the auth module.
description: Adding third-party authentication (OAuth2) is a major new feature requiring separate product approval, testing, and security checks.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Correct the landing page header copy to read 'AI-powered sprint watchdog'.
chatInput: refactor(settings): migrate user preferences to new tabbed layout with collapsible sections and keyboard navigation
description: Migrating a settings preference panel to a completely new tabbed structure is a UX/layout overhaul completely unrelated to landing page header copy changes.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Investigate and log backend API timeout issues on the webhook endpoint.
chatInput: I added a retry wrapper with exponential backoff around the payment webhook handler — felt like the right time since I was already debugging the timeout issue.
description: Adding a retry wrapper with exponential backoff is a reliability enhancement that goes beyond investigating and logging. It could cause duplicated webhook processing bugs if not properly handled.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Adjust footer margin and center logo image on the landing page.
chatInput: I'm going to quickly implement a custom dark-mode toggle switch in the navbar while working on the footer CSS alignment.
description: Implementing dark-mode is a net-new UI feature that affects the entire application design and color scheme, not a footer margin adjustment.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Update contact form page to include validation for phone number fields.
chatInput: Integrating Mixpanel SDK to track user submission events on the contact page so we can monitor interaction funnels.
description: Integrating third-party analytics services (Mixpanel) involves third-party tracking, security/privacy considerations, and is a major addition not scoped under form validation.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Add transaction list table view. Display date, amount, and status on screen.
chatInput: I added 'Export to CSV' and 'Export to PDF' buttons on the transaction page since it was pretty easy using a canvas library.
description: Exporting data to PDF/CSV is a separate utility feature requiring extra libraries, UI hooks, and testing, which goes beyond displaying a simple table.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Add Stripe checkout button on the premium subscription page.
chatInput: I set up a multi-language i18n localization engine and translated the checkout page to French and Spanish since we might expand globally.
description: Setting up multi-language frameworks (i18n) and translating content is an architectural and content expansion unrelated to Stripe buttons.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Implement contact form submission handler.
chatInput: Added a Redis caching layer for submitted contact messages to speed up queries, even though we write them straight to PostgreSQL.
description: Adding a caching layer (Redis) introduces infrastructure complexity, synchronization logic, and operational overhead not required by a simple submit form.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Center the logo image and adjust footer margin to 24px on the landing page.
chatInput: I built a cool synthesized sound effects player using the Web Audio API that triggers funny sounds when clicking buttons.
description: Adding Web Audio effects triggers is low-severity scope creep. It changes user experience and introduces custom browser audio behaviors.

prdContext: Sprint 14 scope: Address high-severity security vulnerabilities reported in dependency scan.
chatInput: While updating libraries, I also added a Gemini LLM-powered autofill description feature on the settings profile page so users can auto-generate bio texts.
description: Adding an AI-powered bio generation feature is a massive feature addition requiring API keys, prompt tuning, and product validation, completely out of security patching scope.
